test.query: SELECT * FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY EventTime LIMIT 1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM hits_10m_single WHERE URL LIKE '%google%' ORDER BY EventTime LIMIT 2 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM hits_10m_single WHERE URL LIKE '%google%' ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 5 FORMAT Null

SELECT * FROM hits_10m_single WHERE URL LIKE '%google%' ORDER BY EventTime LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
